mapper.select: SELECT MAX(inttimestamp) AS inttimestamp FROM xe_cvnms_perf_if

SELECT strifid, strresid, strtypemin, inttimestamp, intyear , intmonth, intday, inthour, intmin, intweek , intbandwidth, fltbpsin, fltbpsout, fltppsin, fltppsout , flterrorin, flterrorout, fltdiscardin, fltdiscardout, fltunknown , fltusage, flhcinoctets, flhcoutoctets, flhcinucastpkts, flhcoutucastpkts , flhcinmulticastpkts, flhcoutmulticastpkts, flhcinbroadcastpkts, flhcoutbroadcastpkts, fltbpsinmax , fltbpsoutmax, fltppsinmax, fltppsoutmax, flterrorinmax, flterroroutmax , fltdiscardinmax, fltdiscardoutmax, fltunknownmax, fltusagemax FROM xe_cvnms_perf_if WHERE inttimestamp > #{inttimestamp} ORDER BY inttimestamp
